english: mast (of a ship or flagpole) / pole, pylon
notes: There is also 'die Mast' (feminine), meaning fattening/feeding of animals, but 'der Mast' is the common meaning referring to a pole or mast.

sentences.german: Der Mast des Segelbootes ist sehr hoch.
sentences.english: The mast of the sailing boat is very tall.

sentences.german: Die Masten der Stromleitung stehen in einer langen Reihe.
sentences.english: The pylons of the power line stand in a long row.
